text_src: Sorry, I can't help you with that.
Maybe you can TRADE it for something more useful.
That's one of the Quantum Mechanics' tools.
Ready it and use the "Y" BUTTON
You might be able to find a MAP with it as well.
That looks like a part from one of the Quantum Mechanics' MACHINES.
Quick!  Use it to restore the
It's part of your COMBAT SUIT...
That looks like the key to the
We've still got work to do!
Just remember_it won't operate with Slugs around.
FIND & ACQUIRE A BETTER STARMAP CHIP
FIND & ACQUIRE A NEW COMBAT SUIT MODULE!
I'll plug it in, and then
What can I do for you?
Unless you replace my MULTIMESH GEAR, I can't make any more relays.
FIDO will help you find the right planet
a CAMOUFLAGE MODULE for your combat suit.
Why, that little gadget just needs the right orbit!
There's just one more task here...
What are you waiting around here for?
I don't know anything about that.
Haven't made any progress yet, huh?
Now I can talk to FIFI!
help us get past the Face
I might even ask her for a date!
out of here, you bother me!
Someday you'll earn a COMBAT SUIT MODULE that will help you
If you've got any STAR FUEL DRUMS you can blow up
has an explosive new weapon for
Connect modules with the "A" BUTTON, and use them by pressing "X."
Whoever wears it is entitled to a big promotion!
I can't locate that planet without
...in recognition of your bravery and tireless
One of our PROBES has found
Do we know who made it?
Perhaps it is the work of...
Pathetic Earthling!  You dare to challenge the Sultan of Slime???
I'll scatter your bones across the galaxy!!!
Hello, Earthling!  I'll bet you thought I was dead...
I hope your bony knees are knocking!
Foolish Earthling!  You cannot escape the punishment Fate has decreed!
You won't sweep me aside so easily this time, stiff-jointed one...
...with my new equipment I can hide in plain sight!
Well, well, Earthling, now you've made your fatal mistake...
...daring to face me on my own ship...
...in the middle of my own universe!
Looks like you got me this time, Earthling!
But don't start advertising victory yet...
You've won again!  Better celebrate while you've got the chance...
You didn't win, you just got lucky!
Remember this, Earthling_luck always runs out!
You've stopped me from deflating reality!
You better hope we never meet again...
What took you so long to find me?  That barking computer said you'd be here days ago!
Oh well_since you saved my life, I'll tell you a dark secret only spies are supposed to know...
There's an old MYTH that reality is governed by FOUR SECRET MACHINES...
...invented and operated by wizards called the QUANTUM MECHANICS.
You probably thought that idea was just a bedtime story.
And the Slugs are out to SABOTAGE those machines.
If they succeed, reality will evaporate!
It's your job to find and repair them!
Are you ready to do your duty?
First of all, you need a way to track down Slugs wherever they hide...
This KEY will unlock an ELECTRONIC CHIP that FIDO needs to chart more of the galaxy.
It will also reveal one of the Quantum Mechanics' machines.
Well, got to get on with my spying!
Maybe our paths will cross again.  Meanwhile...
You know, a spy is always in trouble. Thanks for helping me again!
When we first met, I wondered if you knew what you were doing...
...but I see now you're a real Trooper, so I guess you can take some bad news.
How many soldiers have signed up to fight for humanity, do you think...
The High Command doesn't want it generally known, but they can only pay for ONE indestructible ship...
...and ONE perfect warrior to defeat those slippery Slugs.
You're good, or you wouldn't be here...
So here's something to help you beat the terrible odds...
This password will get you a new
...when you give it to the top secret ARMORY ROBOT in his top secret hideout.
kHey!  Don't shoot!  It's me, your favorite spy!
Because of my clever new disguise, the enemy can't spot me...
...but it's no fun standing around in a Slug suit all day long.
Tell you what_defeat all the Slugs here...
Then you can disguise yourself just like I do.
Looks like the coast is clear, so I'll turn this LOCKSWITCH over to you.
Use it to unlock the secret door, and you'll find a new module for your combat suit.
You know, I'll bet you could fool the Slug Lord himself with a disguise like mine.
If you're ever on board one of his ships, try it out!
!  Those greasy grubs locked me up!
But I did some spying before they caught me, and I know something they don't!
Dwayne has a spare VACUUM VALVE hidden somewhere in his machine...
...and I've got the KEY that will help you find it!
Here!  Use it before we shrivel up like prunes!
, you fought off the Sultan of Slime!
The Quantum Pump is working again!
...and there'll be plenty of room for us bony beings to roam around!
Before he left, Dwayne gave me his proudest possession.  He claims it's the SECRET OF THE UNIVERSE!
That sounds ridiculous, but I'm only a spy, so what do I know?
Guard it well, Big Sky Trooper...
...it may help you find the Slug Lord's Flagship!
kBrrrrrr, I'm too cold to talk!
Brrrrrr, I'm cold!  Thanks for thawing me out!
Listen_the Slugs have a SECRET LAB here in their ship to study Earthly TERROR WEAPONS...
Here's the KEY I stole before they put me in the deep freeze...
Maybe you can find a new weapon there!
Now let's get going before they catch us!
The slimy Slugs are no more!
...and I want you to know that I'm proudest of all!
Therefore, on behalf of the Sidereal Shock Troops...
...I hereby award you Earth's highest honor...
Wear it with pride!  You're a winner, General
I'm the guy who hands out supplies around here, and I treat my friends WELL, know what I mean?
Just in case, I'll spell it out:  you are NO friend of mine!
I used to be a recruiting sergeant, but the High Command busted me to SUPPLY SPECIALIST...
...and sent me out to this forgotten corner of the galaxy.
And all because I thought a WIMP like you had the makings of a Trooper!
I never should have signed you up!
Don't expect any UPGRADES for your combat suit or any other favors...
...unless you find a way to get on my good side!
I deserve one for serving out here, don't you think?
Come back when you've found something for me, and THEN we'll talk supplies!
Hello, Trooper.  Got something for me?
I said I wanted a MEDAL, kid!  Go get it!
F makes me a SERGEANT again!
Okay, Trooper, I'm ready to do my duty...
...the higher your RANK, the better the COMBAT SUIT you're entitled to wear.
Each time you get promoted, show me your STATUS STAR...
...and I'll UPGRADE your suit to absorb more battle damage.
Sorry, pal, I could care less about that.
Your suit is already *MAXED OUT* for this rank!
You know, General, I hate to bring it up, but I feel I've been an obstacle to your success.
If I were a smart CAPTAIN, I'd probably know important ways to help you defeat the enemy...
I hear the Slugs stole a MEDAL that was meant for ME...
...maybe you can find it on one of their WRECKS.
F promotes me to FLEET CAPTAIN!
You know, I feel smarter already!
The High Command has a secret factory on Planet ARSENAL...
j, or my name ain't Captain Slack.
Here's a REQUISITION SLIP_the supervisor won't help you without it .
Talk to FIDO_he knows the galaxy better than I do.
That's your ticket to a new
Trade with me and pay no tax!
Come on, kid, you can't lose...
just make me an offer I can't refuse.
Maybe we can help each other...
...and I know you still need that
Have you talked to Bargain Bob?  He's got a SILVER SPOON I want.
If you get your hands on it,
And a very fine spoon it is!
That's a valuable piece of history.
So long.  Remember, I'm always on the lookout for shady deals...
I'm Bargain Bob, a trading fool...
I'll trade for anything that's cool!
I'll trade for almost any stuff...
no man can ever trade enough!
By the way, I'm short on diamond rings at the moment.  Find one for me, and I'll make you happy.
By the way, when you get some money, let's talk about a Fast Food PERMIT...
The rock on that ring is a humdinger!
I'll sell you a Fast Food Franchise Permit for 500 tokens.
All the food you can eat, and Slugs sure hate the advertising!
Sorry, I'm out of Fast Food Permits.
Sorry_some other trader might want that, but not me.
Bye for now.  Remember, I'm here for all your bargain needs!
I'm Demolition Dan, the arms merchant man...
...getting rich on weapons, that's my plan!
I've got a lot of explosive devices...
and everything's offered at very low prices!
By the way, I'm curious about the Big Questions in life...
...if you should happen to stumble on the SECRET OF THE UNIVERSE in your travels, I'd be VERY interested.
That's the Secret of the Universe...
I MUST have that card for my collection...
I'll sell you 5 STAR FUEL DRUMS for 100 tokens.
Sorry, soldier, I can't use it.
Be seeing you.  Come on back whenever you need a bomb or two.
I am the SPIRIT of this planet.  Talk to me after you defeat the Slugs here.
Thank you for defeating the Slugs.
In return, I will now give you my planet's *GREATEST* treasure...
I belong in the Fate Machine...
...but until you take me back, I'm a powerful ally!
Try Old Tom's Wheel of Fortune... you'll see!
k8kHold on.  You can't carry any more of those.
Clear the slugs off the planet, and THEN we'll talk!
Welcome aboard the E.S.S. DIRE WOLF, General
It's a Canine Class Attack Cruiser_
I'm FIDO, your ship's Flexible Interactive Digital Omnicomputer...
When you need help, I'll supply it.  When you get into trouble, I'll bail you out.
If you have any questions about running the ship, ask me about this OPERATING MANUAL...
Now listen up!  Our first MISSION is:
PROCEED TO PLANET HORNBEAM AND RESCUE SECRET AGENT FROM INVADING SLUGS!
We need to see more of the galaxy if we're ever going to stop the Slugs...
...but I can only display stars listed in my STARMAP CHIP...
You'll never defeat the Slugs without some better equipment...
Is it me, or are the stars getting dimmer?
I think those Slugs have shut down the Sunshine Machine...
We're never going to find the ORBIT MACHINE...
...unless we can see deeper into the galaxy...
I've got a distress call from PLANET STONEWALL...
PROCEED TO PLANET STONEWALL & INVESTIGATE DISTRESS CALL!
I've got a lead on some important new equipment...
We need to fix the ORBIT MACHINE before all the
I guess we can't repair the Orbit Machine until we get the necessary part...
Now that you found the TINY PLANET...
...we've got a chance to fix the Orbit Machine once and for all...
If we hope to defeat the Slugs, we need to find the Fate Machine...
...and for that we need a better map...
Our secret agent is in trouble again...
RESCUE SECRET AGENT FROM PLANET HALCYON!
I'm afraid the Fate Machine is fated to fail unless we find the missing parts...
FIND & ACQUIRE THE FINGER OF FATE!
Parts are still missing from that unlucky Fate Machine...
The unfortunate Fate Machine still needs one more part...
FIND & ACQUIRE THE WHEEL OF FORTUNE!
Now that you've found the parts we need, it's time to challenge destiny...
So now we know where the Face of Space is located_so what?
We'll never get there, or find the QUANTUM PUMP either, without a better map...
You'll never get inside the Quantum Pump without better tools...
Maybe you should talk to Sergeant Slack about the problem.
He's a pretty sour soldier, but we're desperate...
Does reality seem a lot smaller to you? It does to me!
I think the Quantum Pump has stopped...
I've heard that Demolition Dan has a Talk-to-Girls chip...
...and I need it to talk FIFI into helping us with the Face of Space...
There's nothing left to do but stop the Slug Lord...
...and his mucus monsters once and for all...
...so prepare yourself for the FINAL MISSION:
PROCEED TO SLUG FLAGSHIP & DEFEAT THE SULTAN OF SLIME!
I'll give you 500 tokens for it.
!  This permit qualifies you to join my Fast Food TEAM!
Together we'll spread the benefits of instant meals all across the galaxy!
Now, let's get down to business!
Sorry...if you want a career in Fast Food, show me a Franchise PERMIT.
I'm offering a special SALE on Fast Food Franchises today!
I'm offering career opportunities in the Fast Food business...
Show me your qualifications, and we'll talk it over.
I'm selling Fast Food that's delicious AND nutritious!
I've done all I can for you, General.  Goodbye!
You want a new combat suit module? Show me a Requisition Slip!
Let's see...yes, that is the proper password...
...ah, yes...it's Old Ned's card, with instructions to close his account.
Iron Ore!  Let me refine that for you!
...here's a top secret COMBAT SUIT MODULE!
...here you go, General_a stainless steel ingot!
...and here's a fully assembled COMBAT SUIT MODULE!
That is not the proper code.
You want money?  Then show me a credit card!
Bring me some iron ore if you want a steel ingot!
I'll just take that for my files, thank you.
Ha, you bag of bones!   You'll never survive the Slug Lord's Flagship!
But I can open a DOOR for you...
...if you give me a good reason!
There's a tricky TRAPDOOR guarding our Earth Weapons Analysis Lab.
I'm studying Earth's secret weapons, and I've got a deadly ADVERTISEMENT you can have...
Here in the CLONING LAB, I've learned how to CLONE a lot of things.
I'm not too busy right now, so I'll try to clone something for you...
Your Secret Agent is frozen solid in the Cloning Lab.
Get off this hulk, Earthling!  You can't explore it anyway!
Unless you can turn into a Slug, you'll never fit through our travel tubes!
Beware, Earthling, the SULTAN OF SLIME is waiting...
...for a sign that you're ready to die!
There's a kiosk that controls temperature in the Cloning Lab...
...if you're interested, you can reach it with my KEY...
The sign is yours!  It's not much of a weapon anyway!
You'll need a lot of them to do any damage around here...
...but you'll never get enough from me!
Whoever wants to walk must not
Get out of here_you've got what you need!
Go away, Earthling_I'm busy cloning Secret Agents to destroy you!
Go away_your stupid Agent is already thawed!
Combat Clones or not, the fewer humans around the better, I say!
Thanks for the trading card, Mr. Bones!
I want to make RELAYS, but I need the right PARTS.
A relay KIT_just what I need!
...here's a working TRANSPORT RELAY, complete with lifetime guarantee!
You know, I feel MUCH better now...
You never know...HIC...when I might might break down...GAK...
7.  So you've found my fuel supply...
You can use STAR FUEL DRUMS as bombs!
Blast open weakened walls and start landslides on rocky slopes!
Just remember_you can't restart my furnace without the IGNITER.
Use it with Star Fuel Drums and blow up the Slug Lord!
...looks like the army has arrived in the nick of time...
..that is, if you call one soldier an army!
I've run this place for thousands of years...
...and I've NEVER seen anything like these slithery Slugs!
Out of nowhere, they've invaded our galaxy and sabotaged my Sunshine Machine!
If we don't RESTART it, reality will soon grow dark and cold.
I'm too old and tired to fight, so I've UNLOCKED a certain door to help you.
Who knows?  You may be the hero we need...
You sure melted those green jellybeans!
...blow up a fuel drum and restart
Good work, kid_now reality won't freeze solid after all!
Maybe you ARE a one-soldier army...
...if so_TEN-HUT!  There's a lot more work to be done!
Those goobers are attacking on all fronts.
If they found THIS machine, they've probably found the OTHER ones that keep the galaxy in good working order.
I'm particularly worried about the ORBIT MACHINE run by my brother Clyde.
Stars & planets will be flying every which way pretty soon...unless you can repair it.
The problem is, I've forgotten where to find Clyde's planet.
I used to know, but I'm old now, so it's all up to you!
Now, get going!  Say hello to Clyde for me!
kSo you've found the Star Finder...
...give it to FIDO, and he'll be able to locate
You found the most important thing
Take it to the Governor Room and restore
Hand it over, and I'll launch it!
You'll find one around here somewhere, I'm sure.
Ask FIDO.  He'll help you find it.
My brother Bert told me about you...
...said you might be able to get rid of these slimy Slugs.
' always went right where they're supposed to go...
Now those gummy globs have locked me up in here while they wreck my life's work!
If you don't find the ORBIT GOVERNOR and fix
...all the heavenly bodies in the galaxy will come loose and sail away wherever they dang please!
Going to be worse than a roomful of cats!
Here's a RED KEY to get you started.
Sorry, kid, I've got bad news.
Slugs smashed the TINY PLANET that used to run on the orbital track here.
If you want to reach the Orbit Governor, you need to find a replacement.
I don't have any spares lying around...
...so I guess you better start looking out there in SPACE.
!  Those gooey green guys are gone!
Now we don't have to worry about
But your job's not over yet!
Those silly Slugs have turned them-
...by tinkering with my cousin Rebecca's FATE MACHINE!
You've got to find that machine and fix it!
First, use it to find a new STARMAP CHIP for FIDO...
...then look for a planet called SAMARRA!
...take these TRANSPORT RELAYS_ they'll help you travel faster!
Say hello to Rebecca for me!
...I'm supposed to be in charge here...
...but the Sultan of Slime and his bilious brigade have locked me up...
...if the Fate Machine had failed completely, you wouldn't be here to rescue me, now would you?
But there's not much time!  If you want to make reality safe for us bony types...
...you've got to get Fate working again!
There are THREE parts missing from
And it has nothing to do with the Slugs, I'm ashamed to say.
They were stolen YEARS AGO by three greedy Quantum Mechanics...
I'm sure that's why the Slugs are such a problem today...
...Fate broke down, and they oozed out of imaginary space to conquer our galaxy...
...with nary a smidgen of bad luck to slow them down!
Our only hope is for you to FIND the missing parts and bring them back!
First, find the FINGER OF FATE.
Now that Fate is operating again, I'm sure you'll have good luck...
Yes, there's one more machine the Slug Lord's viscous villains are trying to destroy.
It's chugging away day and night to keep reality fully inflated.
If the Slugs ruin the Quantum Pump, everything will shrink to the size of a peanut!
Here, use this ELECTROKEY to find a new STARMAP CHIP for FIDO!
I'm just a silly old lady.
You must find all the parts missing from
Use it when your way forward is uncertain.
Go when it glows!  Stop when it flashes!
That's MY planet.  Fate has brought you here!
Well, child, my machine needs parts!
Ask FIDO to help you find them.
!  You found the WHEEL OF FORTUNE!
!  You found the FINGER OF FATE!
Keep it for now_you need it more than I do.
Quick!  Take it where it's needed!
I'll just put that part back where it belongs, thank you very much!
By the way, you haven't found my GUIDING LIGHT yet.
Better look around_without it you may not get much farther.
Be sure to look for my GUIDING LIGHT!  You'll need it to follow invisible paths.
...you must consult the Oracle of Fate!
I'm Dwayne, and I run the Quantum Pump.
At least I did once upon a time...
...before the Slugs locked me up in here!
Those gummy globules have stolen the Pump's VACUUM VALVE.
Unless you replace it, reality will collapse...
...and we'll all wind up smaller than a dog's dream.
What you need now is my QUANTUM
...so I've opened up the secret room where I keep it.
,, so I'll open the door here...
...but I can't stand to watch you get whipped...
...so I'm leaving while I'm still big enough to travel!
I thought you wanted to save
It will help you find a secret room...
...and a key to the QUANTUM JUMPS that will catapult you deeper into
I liked it better before the Slugs showed up!
I'll bet you already used it_to find me!
My stars!  You found a VACUUM VALVE!
Now find the pump ITSELF and re-attach the thing, before we shrink out of sight!
I'm a cranky old man, kid.  I don't understand any newfangled stuff!
Now get going_I'm feeling deflated already!
Step right up and experience the irresistable charm of...
Hey!  Do I look like a charity?
Come back when you've got some dough!
Take a look_it really IS the World's Largest Atom...
Well, what do I care?  I'm just looking for a way to make money.
I used to work in the Fate Machine, but I got bored.
I stole the Finger of Fate to lure people to my roadside attraction...
It was a good idea, but the Slugs captured my BANK.
Tell you what, kid_bring me my money, and the Finger of Fate is YOURS!
Look for my BANK on the planet SCRATCH!
Show this to the banker_it's my CREDIT CARD!
Find the planet SCRATCH, bring back my MONEY, win the Finger of Fate!
I the paltry contents of your piggy bank!
Thanks for running that little errand!
Here_the Finger of Fate is yours!
Why not let Old Bill help you get a jump on tomorrow?
I've got Lady Luck here, fresh from the Fate Machine...
...and she's ready to tell your fortune!
Hey!  What are you trying to pull
I don't know, Trooper_your future looks dim!
Now listen to what the Lady says!
When Lady Luck hides her face, the lucky one finds her hiding place!
I'm out of luck and out of business!
Can you believe that I used to waste my time maintaining the Fate Machine?
I'll bet you already know what took me thousands of years to learn...
No doubt a strong-minded Trooper such as yourself...
...can win just about any game by sheer willpower!
Old Tom's Wheel of Fortune should be especially easy.
Broke, huh?  Come back when you've got some spare change!
Get ready!  I'm spinning the wheel!
Hmmm...you and Lady Luck don't seem to know each other very well.
Well, well, well_Lady Luck seems to be in YOUR pocket tonight!
Let's call it quits, shall we?
This is terrible!  Now I'm BANKRUPT!
I have no use for it any more!
Be it so!  I see your fate!
To free the galaxy, seek the passage between real and imaginary space...
...where Slugs travel from their fortress into battle!
This place has a countenance and a NAME...
FIDO will help you find it...
...but be aware, passage through the Face requires the help of another!
Here's something I found for you!
I'm a long way from here.  Try searching for me somewhere else!
I'm only a couple of planets away.  Keep searching for me!
I'm on the next planet.  Please hurry,
I need to talk to you!
I'm somewhere on this planet.  See you soon!
Someday you'll be able to use these FAST FOOD marks to fortify planets against attack...
See that nearby DOOR?  That's the entrance to a vault made by the Quantum Mechanics!
I think the ORBIT MACHINE is here on one of these asteroids.
Look for the FATE MACHINE somewhere on this planet.
See that rock?  Try pushing it to a corner, then slide and bounce off.
It's the opposite of what you think!
This planet has something you need.
There's a FACTORY on this planet that manufactures RELAYS.
If you do, the factories on this planet will make you a new combat suit module!
So you've got a Relay Station...
You'll need a lot of them if you plan to explore the entire Galaxy.
Now go unlock a door somewhere!
This tool will open up secret sections of the catwalks.
Use it wherever you find special crank SOCKETS!
Let me open the door for you.
Be careful!  The Slug Lord himself is in there!
...I can't let you go any further until you're ready to restart
Sorry, Trooper, I'm out of luck and out of business!
I've already installed a better ship upgrade!
Go ahead, ask me a question...
Hold on while I ask her to
That's a NEENAPOD!  The seeds contain a potent medicine.
You should find as many as you can.
...to restore your health whenever you get beat up!
It charges up your COMBAT SUIT.
When it runs out of energy, I'll replace it automatically...
...as long as we have some extras.
Eventually you'll have to find them on your own.
Too bad our supply situation is so unstable, but we're in a war!
It's full of high octane STAR FUEL, the stuff that keeps the stars shining.
It's highly explosive, so you can use it as a BOMB.
Place it with the "Y" BUTTON and use the IGNITER to set it off.
Be sure to run away before it blows up!
It's only as smart as you are.
Fly it to a target with the CONTROL PAD and explode it by releasing the "Y" BUTTON.
If you have an INCUBATOR you can
Of course,this delicate creature doesn't live long, so look sharp!
If you have any spy fly eggs, it will HATCH them.
Loosely speaking, it's a form of advertising.
Slugs hate things like this and shrivel up when they touch them.
Money comes in handy in this galaxy...
...you need it to buy Fast Food Franchises.
It doesn't grow on trees, but some traders will pay COLD CASH for certain special items.
Use it on a planet surveyed for development, and you'll have a wonderful restaurant...
Slugs hate advertising and won't go near any planet that has one of these!
...and you too can be in the fast food business!
Use it when you need your health restored in the heat of battle.
It's not as good for you as a neenapod, but what do you expect...
This is advertising so powerful that the Slug Lord himself will shrivel when he sees it.
Quick!  Show it to him!  It's your big chance to win the war!
There's a FACTORY somewhere that will make a working RELAY from that kit...
...but I don't know where to find it.
The Relay Factory needs gears to operate...
...but they wear out fast, so collect as many as possible.
Don't you know SLUG TRADING CARDS are illegal?
I'm not sure how lucky it is.
It almost looks like it was made by the Quantum Mechanics themselves...
It's part of the Interstellar SKYWAY System.
Traveling the Skyway requires a relay at the BEGINNING or END of every trip.
To deploy or retrieve relays, go to the Viewport and press "A."
Scan defeat Avenger Class ships in
Scan defeat Dreadnought Class ships in
When you're away from the Dire Wolf, call me, and I'll transport you back.
Be sure to run away before they explode!
That looks like secret spy stuff to me.
Ready it to locate hidden Slugs!
Here are the basics of ship operation:
On the MENU screen, the MAP ICON activates the SKYWAY MAP...
If you want to TRANSPORT DOWN to a planet...
...stand in the AIR LOCK and press the
If you want to TRANSPORT UP to the Dire Wolf...
...ready the FIDO icon and press "Y" to call me for assistance.
If you want to heal your wounds...
...stand at the FIRST AID STATION, ready a NEENAPOD, and press " Y."
If you want to save your progress...
...approach one of the SLEEP CHAMBERS and press " A."
...press "A" to THRUST the Dire Wolf forward and STEER with the CONTROL PAD.
Once you acquire them, launch SPACE MINES with "Y" and QUARK TORPEDOES
Anything else I can help you with?
That looks like a FAITHFUL SERVICE MEDAL!
That's a MEDAL of DESTINY, without a doubt!
It looks like a worthless old lamp...
...that got rubbed once too many times.
If that's the SECRET OF THE UNIVERSE, then I'm a coyote!
I think those old Quantum Mechanics are getting a little TOO old, you know?
It looks like pewter to me.
It looks like a fake to me.
You were fortunate to find it!
It looks like that renegade Quantum Mechanic, Old Ned, has a big account at the OFFSHORE BANK.
Find the bank, and the money is yours!
I think you've got enough cash to buy the FINGER OF FATE from Old Ned!
You can probably use it to get something valuable...
In the military, a piece of paper like that is worth more than gold.
With some work, you may be able to requisition a new COMBAT SUIT MODULE!
